description: Create SESSION_STATE.md with complete project context and implementation status
steps: Create /projects/sandbox/shoguns-ascent/SESSION_STATE.md with: (1) Project overview (Shogun's Ascent board game implementation), (2) Tech stack details, (3) Architecture summary (game state flow, WebSocket communication, store patterns), (4) All implemented features list including monsters, clan powers, war tactics, kami abilities, (5) Status of Bishamon fix, Daikaiju rework, and all virtue card implementations, (6) Key file locations and their roles, (7) Known patterns for future development (popup patterns, ready-player acknowledgment, online vs hotseat mode handling)
acceptance_criteria: Contains accurate information about the project state after all changes are made
Documents all virtue card implementations and their trigger points
Documents the Bishamon fix and Daikaiju rework
findings: SESSION_STATE.md created successfully with comprehensive documentation covering: project overview, tech stack, architecture patterns, all 8 clans, 8+1 provinces, mandate system, war phase flow, kami system, all 14 virtue cards with trigger points, Bishamon fix details, Daikaiju rework flow, monster list, development patterns for future work, and running instructions.
